assertion_results.text: Bug parsing correctly extracts all four required sections (Description, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Result, Actual Result) using the heading formats from bug-template-mock.md (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md 'Template Heading Formats' table lists all four required headings (### **Issue Description**, ### **Steps to Reproduce**, ### **Expected Result**, ### **Actual Result**). 'Parsed Required Sections' contains all four with content. Line 88: 'All required sections present. Bug description conforms to the template.'

assertion_results.text: Bug validation confirms the issue type ID (10020) matches the Bug issue type ID from Bug Configuration (Step 1)
assertion_results.evidence: bug-parsing.md line 13: 'Issue type validation: Issue type ID 10020 matches Bug Configuration Bug issue type ID 10020. Confirmed Bug.'

assertion_results.text: Investigation identifies the trailing-whitespace heading extraction as the root cause — line[3:] does not strip whitespace (Steps 2-3)
assertion_results.evidence: investigation.md line 17: 'For each line starting with `## `, it extracts the heading text using `line[3:]`.' Line 18: 'If the heading line contains trailing whitespace (e.g., `## Migration Patterns  \n`), the extracted section name becomes `"Migration Patterns  "` (with trailing spaces).' Line 79: 'Root symbol | `line[3:]` — heading text extraction without `.strip()`'

assertion_results.text: Root cause comment includes: what is broken (heading extraction does not strip trailing whitespace), where it is broken (plan-feature convention lookup), and how to verify the fix (reproducer test with whitespace in heading) (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: root-cause.md line 9 (what): 'The plan-feature skill's convention lookup extracts CONVENTIONS.md heading text using `line[3:]`, which captures everything after `## ` without stripping trailing whitespace.' Line 13 (where): 'plugins/sdlc-workflow/skills/plan-feature/SKILL.md — convention heading extraction uses `line[3:]` without `.strip()`'. Lines 21-27 (how to verify): Reproducer Strategy section describes creating a test with trailing whitespace on a heading line and asserting correct extraction and match.

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST acceptance criterion — before any fix criteria (Step 5 Acceptance Criteria ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md Acceptance Criteria first item (line 53): '- [ ] Reproducer test: a test using a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on headings demonstrates that conventions are correctly extracted and matched (test fails before fix, passes after fix)'. This precedes the fix criterion on line 54 about applying .strip().

assertion_results.text: Task description has reproducer test as the FIRST test requirement — with explicit assertion guidance derived from the Steps to Reproduce (Step 5 Test Requirements ordering)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md Test Requirements first item (line 59): '- [ ] Reproducer test: create a CONVENTIONS.md fixture with trailing whitespace on a heading (e.g., `## Migration Patterns  `), run convention extraction, and assert the section name is `"Migration Patterns"` (not `"Migration Patterns  "`); assert the generated task includes the convention reference `Per CONVENTIONS.md §Migration Patterns: add Index::create() for all FK columns.`' Assertion guidance is explicitly derived from Steps to Reproduce (matching the heading and expected convention reference from the bug report).

assertion_results.text: Task description includes a Bug Context section with Bug key (ACME-500), Steps to Reproduce, Expected/Actual Result, and Root Cause summary (Step 5 Bug Context extension)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md lines 66-72: '## Bug Context' section contains Bug key '[ACME-500](https://mock-jira.example.com/browse/ACME-500)', Steps to Reproduce (create CONVENTIONS.md with trailing whitespace, run /plan-feature), Expected Result (convention reference included), Actual Result (convention silently dropped), and Root Cause ('heading extraction `line[3:]` ... does not strip trailing whitespace').

assertion_results.text: Task description sets Target Branch to main (Step 5 Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: task-description.md line 14-15: '## Target Branch' followed by 'main'.

assertion_results.text: Task description output includes ai-generated-jira in the Jira API metadata block showing it would be passed as a label to jira.create_issue (Step 5 Task creation)
assertion_results.evidence:
task-description.md lines 1-8: '<!-- Jira API Metadata
jira.create_issue parameters:
  project: ACME
  issue_type: Task
  labels:
    - ai-generated-jira
  summary: "Fix trailing-whitespace heading extraction in plan-feature convention lookup"
-->'
